title: OVERNIGHT WINTER WARMING SHELTER - 211info
text: ASHLAND EMERGENCY WINTER SHELTER OVERNIGHT WINTER WARMING SHELTER Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Offers overnight winter shelter throughout the winter season and when temperatures drop to 32 degrees or below. Limited space available and is first-come first-served. Eligibility: Adults age 18 and older. Leashed pets allowed. Hours: Open 24 hours a day when temperatures drop 32 degrees or below (541) 499-0880 Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers (541) 631-2235 Main phone Main phone (541) 499-0880 Rogue Retreat Intake (541) 774-6790 Citizen Alert for opening notifications Jackson County Text Short Code 888777 Text 97520SHELTER Shelter activation notifications INTAKE PROCEDURE: Walk in or call for more information FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None AREA SERVED: Jackson County TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: Transit: Route 10 stop ID 100570 Cross streets: Ashland and Clay Services: Community Shelters Extreme Weather Shelters Other Services Offered At This Location: DONOR SERVICES - DONATIONS VOLUNTEER OPPORTUNITIES - VOLUNTEERING If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
